name: browser_waiting_for_user_interaction
description:
Request to temporarily hand over control of the browser to the user.

The user will be prompted to take control of the browser. Once the user confirms,
they can interact with the browser freely. When the user finishes and returns control,
the browser will be automatically locked again for the agent to continue.

Use this tool when you need user assistance with browser interactions,
such as logging in, completing CAPTCHAs, or performing actions that require human judgment.

viewId.description: Target browser tab ID. If omitted, uses the last interacted tab.

reason.description:
The reason why the agent needs to hand over control to the user.
This will be displayed to the user to explain why their assistance is needed.
For example: "Please log in to your account", "Please complete the CAPTCHA verification",
"Please select the correct option from the dropdown".
